data.body:
PASS 1 review — criterion T10 (Infrastructure / IaC) [overlay]: NOT-APPLICABLE.

This is a documentation-only ticket. Scope explicitly states "Docs only; the canonical workflow-engine intended-use doc lives in 6f2d." The What/Acceptance Criteria provision no cloud resources, no IaC (Terraform/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible), and no Kubernetes/Helm. Per the overlay's ANTI-FP rule ("not-applicable for non-infra tickets"), T10 passes with no findings.

Affirmations (T10): correctly out of scope — no infra provisioning, no remote-state/IAM/secrets/cost surface to evaluate.
